models.title: Models
models.description: Configure AI model associations, capabilities, and fallback rules.
models.filters.filterByName: Filter by name or model ID...
models.fields.name: Name
models.dialogs.create.title: Add Model
models.dialogs.create.description: Create a new AI model configuration
models.dialogs.edit.title: Edit Model
models.dialogs.batchCreate.title: Batch Add Models
models.dialogs.batchCreate.description: Add multiple models at once by entering model IDs
models.dialogs.delete.title: Delete Model
models.dialogs.delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
models.dialogs.delete.bulkDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} models? This action cannot be undone.
models.dialogs.association.title: Model Association
models.dialogs.association.description: Configure associated models for {{name}}. During request processing, higher priority (lower value = higher priority) associated models will be used first.
models.dialogs.association.inheritanceHe: If matching developer rules exist, this model inherits them. Rules added here are merged with inherited rules; lower priority values run first, and model rules win ties.
models.dialogs.association.disableDevelo: Use only the rules configured on this model. Developer settings for the same developer will be ignored for this model.
models.dialogs.association.noChannelMode: No models available for this channel
models.dialogs.association.noRules: No association rules configured. Click 'Add Rule' to create one.
models.dialogs.association.previewDescri: Real-time preview of associated channels and models
models.dialogs.association.noConnections: No channel connections. Add rules to see preview.
models.dialogs.association.conditions.pr: Only apply this association when the estimated input prompt tokens match the selected threshold.
models.dialogs.association.conditions.co: Apply this association only when the request matches all configured conditions.
models.dialogs.association.conditions.da: Daily time conditions use the server's local timezone.
models.dialogs.association.ruleHints.cha: Use model {{model}} in channels with tags: {{tags}}
Use model matching {{pattern}} in channels with tags: {{tags}}
models.dialogs.developerAssociation.desc: Configure shared channel rules for {{name}} models.
models.dialogs.developerAssociation.inhe: These rules apply to every model whose developer is {{name}}. Select only a channel or channel tags; each model automatically uses its own model ID when routing.
models.dialogs.developerAssociation.prev: Preview inherited channels. Each model will match its own model ID in these channels.
models.dialogs.status.enableDescription: Are you sure you want to enable {{name}}?
models.dialogs.status.disableDescription: Are you sure you want to disable {{name}}?
models.dialogs.status.archiveDescription: Are you sure you want to archive {{name}}?
models.dialogs.status.archiveWarning: Archived models will not be used for AI requests until they are restored.
models.dialogs.status.restoreDescription: Are you sure you want to restore {{name}}?
models.dialogs.status.restoreInfo: Restoring this model will re-enable it for AI requests.
models.dialogs.bulkDisable.title: Bulk Disable Models
models.dialogs.bulkDisable.description: Are you sure you want to disable {{count}} models?
models.dialogs.bulkDisable.warning: Disabled models will not be used for AI requests until they are re-enabled.
models.dialogs.bulkEnable.title: Bulk Enable Models
models.dialogs.bulkEnable.description: Are you sure you want to enable {{count}} models?
models.dialogs.bulkEnable.warning: Enabling models will allow them to be used for AI requests.
models.dialogs.settings.title: Model Settings
models.dialogs.settings.fallbackToChanne: When enabled, if a requested model is not found in model associations, the system will attempt to find enabled channels that support the requested model directly.
models.dialogs.settings.queryAllChannelM: When enabled, models API returns all models from enabled channels. When disabled, only models with explicit Model entity configuration will be returned.
models.dialogs.settings.modelBlacklistRe: Regex pattern; channel-derived models matching this pattern are excluded from /v1/models. Configured Model entities are not affected. Only effective when 'Query All Channel Models' is enabled. Leave empty to disable.
models.dialogs.settings.defaultModelAPII: When enabled, GET /v1/models returns the same extended metadata as ?include=all by default. When disabled, it returns basic fields unless include is explicitly requested.
models.dialogs.settings.autoReasoningEff: When enabled, models like gpt-5.4-xhigh are normalized to gpt-5.4 and reasoning_effort is automatically set to xhigh, max, low, medium, or high.
models.unassociated.title: Unassociated Channels Detection
models.unassociated.description: Detect channels with models that are not associated with any model configuration
models.unassociated.noUnassociated: All channel models are properly associated
models.unassociated.noSearchResults: No models found matching your search
models.modelCard.title: Model Card
models.modelCard.costHint: These prices are for display purposes only. Actual billing uses the channel's model prices.
models.onboarding.steps.settingsButton.d: Click here to access global model settings. Let's explore what you can configure.
